deletion_policy.description: Specifies the policy for handling the service project when the shared VPC association is deleted; options are "ABANDON" or "DELETE".

host_project.description: Specifies the host project ID that the service project will be attached to within the Shared VPC configuration. Must be an existing project with Shared VPC enabled.

service_project.description: ID of the service project to be attached to the host project for Shared VPC configuration.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for operations related to the attachment of the service project to the shared VPC.
